_comment: Manual assets & liabilities for TRUE net worth (property, mortgages, off-platform savings). Copy this file to assets.json and edit the numbers. Values are in EUR unless you add a "currency". Update whenever they change (e.g. re-estimate the home, or read the new mortgage balance off your loan statement).

liabilities.name: Home mortgage — outstanding principal
liabilities.note: current balance owed, from your loan statement
